title: Kidambi Srikanth Finishes Runner-Up at US Open
indian_angle: India's Kidambi Srikanth reached the final of the US Open, showcasing his strong form.
summary: Indian shuttler Kidambi Srikanth was defeated in the final of the US Open, concluding his impressive run as a finalist.

title: Srikanth's Sportsmanship Highlighted During US Open Final Run
indian_angle: This story highlights Indian shuttler Kidambi Srikanth's sportsmanship during his impressive run to the US Open final.
summary: An article recalling a moment of exceptional sportsmanship from Kidambi Srikanth during his journey to the US Open final, where he overturned a point given to him.

title: Rounak Chouhan Upsets World No 6 at US Open
indian_angle: Indian shuttler Rounak Chouhan delivered a significant upset by beating World No 6 Chou Tien Chen at the US Open.
summary: Indian shuttler Rounak Chouhan, a self-proclaimed Cristiano Ronaldo fan, achieved a notable victory by defeating World No 6 Chou Tien Chen at the US Open.

title: Asian Games Squad Reassembles, Treesa-Gayatri Return
indian_angle: The Indian badminton squad for the upcoming Asian Games, featuring key players like PV Sindhu and Satwik-Chirag, has reassembled.
summary: The Indian Thomas Cup squad has reassembled in preparation for the Asian Games, marking the return of Treesa and Gayatri to the team alongside other prominent players.

title: Satwik-Chirag Crowned Singapore Open Champions
indian_angle: India's top men's doubles pair, Satwiksairaj Rankireddy and Chirag Shetty, secured a prestigious Super 750 title at the Singapore Open.
summary: The formidable Indian men's doubles pair of Satwiksairaj Rankireddy and Chirag Shetty clinched the Singapore Open title after a display of furious rallies and celebratory dances.

title: Tanvi Sharma's Game: Nehwal or Sindhu Style?
indian_angle: This article analyzes the game development of promising Indian shuttler Tanvi Sharma, comparing her style to legends Saina Nehwal and PV Sindhu.
summary: An in-depth analysis explores whether rising Indian badminton talent Tanvi Sharma's playing style is more akin to Saina Nehwal's or PV Sindhu's.
